Superscript
.
^test^
.
<p><sup>test</sup></p>
.

Superscript should not work without content
.
^^
.
<p>^^</p>
.

Superscript should not allow nested markup
.
^foo ^bar^ baz^
.
<p>^foo <sup>bar</sup> baz^</p>
.

Superscript should handle escape sequences
.
^foo\_bar^
.
<p><sup>foo_bar</sup></p>
.

Superscript should not allow whitespace
.
^foo bar^
.
<p>^foo bar^</p>
.

Superscript allows escaped whitespace
.
^foo\ bar\ baz^
.
<p><sup>foo bar baz</sup></p>
.

Superscript: leading/trailing escaped whitespace
.
^\ foo\ ^
.
<p><sup> foo </sup></p>
.

Superscript: 7 backslashes + space (odd escapes space)
.
^\\\\\\\ ^
.
<p><sup>\\\ </sup></p>
.

Superscript: 6 backslashes + space (even leaves space unescaped)
.
^\\\\\\ ^
.
<p>^\\\ ^</p>
.

Superscript should not allow line breaks
.
^test
^
.
<p>^test
^</p>
.

Superscript should be able to be wrapped in emphasis
.
*^test^*
.
<p><em><sup>test</sup></em></p>
.

Superscript can contain escaped closing marker
.
^foo\^bar^
.
<p><sup>foo^bar</sup></p>
.
